description: SmartWriter is an AI copywriting tool that generates personalized cold emails and outreach using real-time data about each prospect to lift reply rates.
overview: SmartWriter writes personalized cold emails and outreach at scale, pulling real-time online data about each prospect so messages feel researched rather than generic.
what_is: SmartWriter is an AI copywriting tool for personalized cold outreach. It generates tailored emails quickly by drawing on real-time data about the recipient, which makes each message feel specific and helps lift reply rates without manual research.

It is strongest for B2B sales, backlink outreach, and social content, especially when you need many unique emails with little effort. Teams typically get usable, personalized outreach within days of starting.

SmartWriter fits the stack by supplying verified emails and contextual messaging that feed CRMs and sequences. It focuses on English cold-outreach copy rather than long-form articles, so it pairs with your sending tools.
